mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound_order ( order_no, customer_id, total_amount, order_status, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbound_order o
o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, c.customer_name, o.total_amount, o.order_status, o.remark, o.created_time FROM outbound_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
